description_long: This nightstand is constructed from light-colored wood with a natural, unfinished appearance, featuring visible wood grain and knots. The front side includes a single drawer with two circular cut-out handles, providing a minimalist and functional design. Below the drawer is an open shelf, currently holding several books, which adds to its utility for storage and display. The nightstand is supported by four black caster wheels, making it easy to move and reposition as needed. The sides and back are plain, with no additional features or openings, emphasizing its simple, boxy form. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, suitable for both residential and urban environments.
description: A light wood nightstand with a single drawer featuring circular cut-out handles, an open shelf, and four caster wheels for mobility. Its minimalist, boxy design is practical and modern.
description_view_0: Front view showing the drawer with two circular cut-out handles, an open shelf with books, and caster wheels.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, uninterrupted wooden panel and two visible caster wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view with a flat, featureless wooden panel and all four caster wheels visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain wooden panel and two caster wheels.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
